functions.name: registerTerm
functions.description: Register the 'Attachment extension' custom search term so it appears in Thunderbird's Message Filters and Search dialogs. Idempotent.

functions.name: getConfigOverride
functions.description: Read the deployed settings-override file from the profile directory (attachment-guard.config.json). Returns the parsed object, or null if the file is absent or invalid. Result is cached and only re-read when the file's modification time changes.

functions.name: getConfigPath
functions.description: Return the absolute path of the settings-override file the add-on looks for in the profile directory.
